entry.title: Re: Can we make a Replacement field in Job Requisition as...
entry.content:
The only option I see is to create this as an object field, where in the MDF object, the external code is defined as a User field.

To maintain data for this object, there are two approaches:

  1. Perform a one-time upload of user data.

  2. Configure edit permissions for the object field on the requisition, so that users can add entries on the fly using the plus icon. Once a user is added, they can then be selected on the requisition.

Additionally, since the external code in EC is of type User, the system will restrict selection to only active users.

 

 

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Unable to execute Adaptation Project from WebIde
entry.content:
1. Create  an Adaptation project in WebIde for Standard Application – Manage Purchase Requisition Professional – F2229 in Safe/Advanced mode.
  2. Right click on the project . Choose Run -> Run flpSandbox.html or Run as Web Application or any other option.
  3. Application does not load. Only a blank page appears.

entry.title: Re: Automated Update of open Sales Orders in case of Avai...

entry.title: Re: Multiple MBGMCR IDocs are triggering for single material document having multiple line items

Is your requirement fulfilled? I have received similar requirement and need quick turn around to the requirement. I appreciate your response.

Thanks, Nikhil

entry.title: how to analyze ATC result for the S4 variant for the conversion
entry.content:
Hello All - 

We have Ran the ATC on SAPBasis central system 7.2 and over ECC environment against the variant - SAP S4 Hana readiness 2023. 

the file was uploaded to the SAP readiness check report ... is there a way we can get automatic s4 simplification fix that can performed thru ADT ( eclipse) ? can we do the same with the SAP GUI in S4..

 

thansks

aakash

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide: Extracting Pegging Data with the New SAP IBP API
entry.content:
Good afternoon, sorry for the delay in replying.

This is quite a strange error. Would it be possible for you to run the test in another version to see if the same error occurs?

Also, could you try testing with an underscore before BASELINE, like "_BASELINE", and see if the issue persists?

entry.title: Re: Can you trigger a Business rule for a candidate based...
entry.content:
As of now, there is no standard flag available in the rule configuration that allows you to trigger a business rule based on whether the candidate is external. To achieve this, you first need to update the external/internal candidate flag in a custom field via integration. You can refer to the link provided for guidance on updating this custom field through integration. Once the data is updated via integration, you can then trigger your business rule based on the value stored in the custom field.

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-q-a/internal-external-candidate/qaq-p/14068749

 

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: Analytic Model - Variable - Option "Dynamic Default" doesn't fill the
entry.content:
Hi,

I have tried one week before similar to Blog  , dymaic values still working for me, I don't see any issue.

Kind regards

Hari

entry.title: (PT) ATCUD and Digital signature in SOAP API
entry.content:
Hello,

For sending billing documents in Portugal market, we are considering using SOAP API “CO_EDI_INVOICE_REQUEST_OUT” in S/4 (https://api.sap.com/api/CO_EDI_INVOICE_REQUEST_OUT/resource).

In Portugal it is mandatory to communicate the Digital Signature information with the billing document, in the SOAP API it is done with the following segments:

 

  • PT_DigitalSignature - optional; type PT_DigitalSignature
    • PT_DocumentNo - optional; type PT_DocumentNo - type string with restriction maxLength(20)
    • PT_QRCode - optional; type PT_QRCode - type string with restriction
    • PT_SgntrCertificate - optional; type PT_SgntrCertificate - type string with restriction maxLength(20)
    • PT_SeriesDocumentNumber - optional; type PT_SeriesDocumentNumber - type string with restriction maxLength(70)
    • PT_HashKey - optional; type PT_HashKey - type string with restriction maxLength(7)
    •  

But we must be on the wrong version of SOAP API “CO_EDI_INVOICE_REQUEST_OUT” in S/4, because these segments are not part of the API for us. So now to the question, does anyone know the class methods and/or function modules we can use to obtain this segment information (PT_DigitalSignature+sub elements) information and attach it to the API message? (We have checked the overall note 3154599 and there is nothing relevant for us..). Or if you 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Does SAP CAP (CDS) support Bun.js as runtime instead of Node.js?
entry.content:
Hi CAP team 👋

I’m exploring replacing Node.js with [Bun](https://bun.sh) for performance reasons in a CAP project.

My main question is:
Does SAP CDS / CAP currently support Bun as a runtime?

Also:
- Are there specific runtime dependencies (e.g., decorators, native Node APIs, module resolution) that currently make it incompatible?
- Are there any plans to make CAP compatible with Bun in the future?

I’d love to switch to Bun for better build/startup speed, but want to make sure CAP features like annotations, services, and CDS modeling are supported.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide: Extracting Pegging Data with the New SAP IBP API
entry.content:
Hi Joao, thanks for the answer

We did exactly that a week ago and it works.
The issue was the Version ID, somehow using "__BASELINE" works.

Thank you again for the article which is very useful

entry.title: Supplementary unit qty at 0 for credit memo invoices in intrastat dispatch report
entry.content:
Hello, 

Can someone please tell me why the supplementary unit and net weight fields are null is intrastat dispatch report for a credit memo invoice ? 

I have checked 2839197 - FAQ: Intrastat processing in S/4HANA and it seems to be legal requirement for the net weight since there is a no good movements. But what about supplementary unit ? 

Thanks & regards,

entry.title: How can we send an automatic notification to the customer for an expiring service quotation?
entry.content:
Hello

Does anybody know how we can send an automatic email notification to the customer concerning the expiring service quotation sent?

There is email notification on the approval pending, but nothing concerning a reminder.

Thank you

Ingrid

entry.title: Re: Issue with connection to postgresql from SAP CAP app...
entry.content:
Hi @friscas, did you whitelist the IP address of your BAS workspace / region?
If not the following resources might help you:
  • Postgres on SAP BTP - Public IP Configuration
  • SAP BAS - Outbound IP Address

entry.title: SAC Deployment Package deleted Existing Folders and Reports. Is there a way to retrieve?
entry.content: During Reports and related objects migration from Dev to QA, I accidentally selected the report path which includes folders and reports. After successful deployment all the existing folders and reports were deleted apart from the few which are deployed. Is there a way to restore existing objects (both folders and reports). If not is there any version control available to restore to previous state before deployment

entry.title: Re: Local Client copy error - CL_MDG_TR_CC, CL_FINB_TR_CC
entry.content:
You have to make an RFC Allowlist. 
You can see this under the transaktion sm59 

Choose the time in wich it should be created:

After the allowlist is created you should be able to do the copy!

Greetings

entry.title: Missing fields and changed field names after upgrade from EHP6 to EHP8
entry.content:
There are lot of changes in field names found after upgrade of SAP ECC from EHP6 to EHP8. We are using SAP for retail stores business. Some of field name change are shown below.

Sr. No. Field name in Version - EHP 6               Field name in Version EHP 8
i. Vendor                                                             Supplier
ii. Article                                                              Material
iii. Site                                                                 Plant
iv. Mdse Category                                               Material Group

Also, field Transportation chain which was visible earlier in EHP6 is not visible on screen in Purchase Info records. Transaction - ME11/ME12/ME13.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Cockpit integration suite with internal Serve...
entry.content:
In that case, always try to delete all Browser data. Happened to me as well, got it to work first after deleting All Browser Data. Important: Time range "All time"

History can stay

entry.title: Re: Blog It Forward - Lluis Salvador
entry.content:
You’ve always had the spirit of a Champion, I just gave a little nudge to what was already shining 😍

So proud to see you now as one of our newest Champions, and even prouder of how you’re stepping into SAP Community with full energy, enthusiasm, and a genuine willingness to share.

Can’t wait to see your positive energy light up the whole SAP community!
Keep shining, Lluis!

entry.title: Roadmap for Record/Folder Management vs BTP Document Service vs Opentext ECM
entry.content:
Hi Guru's,

At my company we are investigating optimizing the document management for certain processes. I am looking for more insight and comparison (pro's and cons) between solutions and roadmaps for:

- Record/folder management

- Opentext ECM

- Document Management Service on BTP.

Regards,

Frank

entry.title: Re: Local Client copy error - CL_MDG_TR_CC, CL_FINB_TR_CC
entry.content: This solves this issue! - Another way is to change parameter rfc/callback_security_method

entry.title: Create a SO with item category TAN and TAX and create Invoice
entry.content:
I am creating a Sales Order with "Manage Sales Order - Version 2". Adding a line item with Finished Product Materials, (SO Item Category TAN). Adding another item as Non Stock Material "NS0002", SO item Category (TAX). I am able to create delivery and both the items are shown in Delivery.

I am not able to create a single invoice with both the items. System is allowing to add both the items using Collective invoice, but in that case, more than 1 Sales Order will be created. 

Kindly provide me the solution if this is possible.

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Learning LMS user data import file on...

entry.title: Split the dunning by type of correspondence
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a new requirement to be able to run the dunning process by type of communication method at customer level.

Currently we have as delivery method Email and Letter, so we would like to separate the Dunning Runs per type of communication at Customer Level?

This is something that can be implemented or is there a solution workaround that can be done allow this requirement?

Thanks and regards

 

Thanks,

 

 

 

PERSON_NAME 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Split the dunning by type of correspondence
entry.content:
Hello!

For your requirement, I recommend utilizing the preselection of business partners feature. This functionality allows you to select specific relevant business partners to be handled in a specific run.

Best regards,
Ronny

entry.title: Subcontracting providing components to the vendor (SD > MM)
entry.content:
have a scenario where:

When a customer requests a sales material X, I provide components X1 and X2 to a subcontractor, who then completes material X and delivers it directly.

How would you resolve this?

I believe the ideal approach is:

  • Creation of a Sales Order with material X.
  • Automatic creation of a Purchase Requisition (PR) with the subcontractor vendor determined automatically.
  • Automatic creation of a Purchase Order (PO) (using RM06BB30) from the PR with the BOM of material X exploded.

Have you implemented something like this? Do you think this is the most appropriate approach? 

Thank you in advance!

Thank you so much for your reply thsi information helps me out a lot.

entry.title: Re: Digital Discovery Assessment - The guided decision between SAP S/4HANA Public or Private Cloud E
entry.content:
Hello @Tobias

 

Thanks for a nice article. I am working on a sample Digital discovery assessment and I have answered all the questions.

However when I want to see the result and proceed ahead I get a hard stop with the below error message.

Is this because it is a sample DDA exercise? On the change log I am able to see that this is approved by Brand guardian. So am I missing some thing here?

Kindly suggest if we are working in right direction before having a discovery session with the customer.

Thanks,

Kartik Shah

entry.title: Re: EC Payroll Archiving
entry.content:
Thanks for bringing this up @ron25

Majority of the customers who moved to EC Payroll 5 to 10 years back are having the above questions due to ever growing DB size.

So far I too haven't found much info in SAP portal on an end to end doc on archiving and purging of data generated in ECP(like time eval and pay results, fi postings) would be keen to know if you manage to get some. In the meanwhile you could explore reading through blogs related to SAP ILM which gives insights to archiving in ECP lined  with internal and external storage systems but many questions still unanswered. I have done some test runs as part of poc but couldn't proceed further due to lack of clarity on the storage options of archived data.

Regarding the employee master data in EC that replicates to ECP you should explore options of purging data in EC based on your org/customer archiving strategy. Historical purged data would automatically be erased from ECP during replication(haven't tested though). Do share your observations if you get some leads on this.

entry.title: Re: Your Web Intelligence idle connection has expired. Close this document and reopen it.

Thanks and Best Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to bypass the SAML2 IdP selection screen for SAP...
entry.content:
Hi, 

Please refer to the SAP KBA 2673366 for further information on how to set the IDP selection to "Automatic", bypassing the SAML2 IDP selection page. 

BR, 
SAP Support

Kind regards, Vero

entry.title: How to Restrict Access at Product Group Level in Manage Product Master Data App?
entry.content:
We are facing an issue in the Manage Product Master Data app where we are unable to restrict user access based on product group. Users are currently able to view and edit product master data for all product groups.

We are attempting to restrict write access at the product group level in the Manage Product Master Data Fiori app

While configuring the restriction in the "Authorization Group for Product Group" field, we are encountering the following issue : The value help (F4) for Authorization Group for Product Group does not display any available values.

Is "Authorization Group for Product Group" currently supported for access control in the Manage Product Master Data app?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Restrict Access at Product Group Level in Mana...
entry.content:
Please follow the KBA's

 https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2808362 Restriction "Authorization Group for Product Group" ignored when using the App "Manage Product Master Data"
 https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3203535 Not possible to maintain values for restriction types 'Authorization Group for Product' and 'Authorization Group for Product Type'

entry.title: Re: Consume deployed CAP Service from locally running CAP...
entry.content:
Hi, thanks a lot for the quick answer.

Unfortunatly If I use the approuter, It is not possible to bind it to my application.

So the application still uses the Authorization that is configured in the .cdsrc.json File.

How do I use the approuter for the Authentication?

This is my Approuter:

{
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "destination": "srv-api",
      "csrfProtection": true
    }
  ]
}
 
Thanks a lot for your help! 🙂

D Sri Divya

entry.title: Re: Purchasing info record not found in purchasing organi...
entry.content: Hello

entry.title: Re: How to automatically create a Job Information event a...
entry.content:
Hi William,
I have tried several options, but none have worked. Here are my suggestions for a scenario like this:
  • According to SAP Best Practice regarding Garden Leave for a different country, Leave of Absence (LOA) can be a solution. You have tried it already, and it seems to work well. This might be a good option since, technically, the employee is on Leave of Absence throughout the Garden Leave period.
  • I would create an event reason for Garden Leave under the Data Change event, making HR/MSS responsible for creating the event in Job Info according to the Garden Leave Date.
  • Create an event reason for Garden Leave under the Termination event with Employee Status set to "Active" and handle it via the Termination screen.
All of these options require additional actions and efforts from the Manager or HR when Termination and Garden Leave are applicable, but this may ensure that the records are properly tracked. Additionally, the solution needs to be aligned with business needs and processes, which I don't know in detail, so my options are just high-level scenarios.
 
Best regards, 
Nicoleta

entry.title: Incorrect value on F2270 Check Sales Volume APP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I saw this strange behavoir using VA02 and F2270.

I create an order ( order type ZRS that come from standard RS) to manage material return and ( after valuation)  the credit memo.

Based on option available in SAP we use the repairs tab in this way: 

 

All seems to be good except for this point:

If credit memo  is not yet  raised, because we are wating a decision then in the new APP F2270 Check sales volume )  the amount is showed like "Open Billing requestes" instead of  "open Credit meno request"

As conseguence the revenue is incorrect .

What is wrong ? 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Missing fields and changed field names after upgrade...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

what exactly is the question here? Do you complain about the field names changed? Then maybe either using the influence tool to raise this or talk to your account manager who is responsible.

Or does something not work and you wanted to report this? Then also please explain exactly what does not work. This way we can help you.

Remember this is not a ticketing system, so no one will have access or know anything without you telling it. 

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Pick List Date must be between order date and cancellation date
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: How to obtain the required SII certificates from the Spanish Tax Agency
entry.content:
The SII (Immediate Supply of Information) is a system of keeping the VAT registration books directly in the Tax Agency servers by means of  a quasi-immediate submission of the invoice VAT-relevant information.

The SII shall shall be mandatory to the following taxpayers with a monthly VAT clearance period:

  • Taxpayers registered in REDEME (Monthly VAT Return registry)
  • Large Enterprises (turnover greater than €6.010.121.04)
  • VAT Groups
  • Since 01/01/2025, the owners of fiscal warehouses of gasoline, gas oil or biofuel subject to the Hydrocarbon Tax, as well as the extracting companies or professionals
  • Other companies registered voluntarily to SII.

The content of the SII invoicing information message must be submitted in XML format. The submissions may be performed by (1) the taxpayer, (2) a representative thereof for the purposes of this process, or (3) an authorised agent, who must have a recognised electronic certificate. Applications that send information to the Tax Agency web services must be authenticated with the client’s electronic certificate.

In summary, in order to use the Tax Agency SII services, it is required to have a recognised electronic certificate accepted by the Tax Agency installed on the computer from which the information is sent. The certificate may have been issued to a Natural Person or Legal Entity. 

 

How to obtain a digital certificate

Remember that for tax transactions with the Tax Agency, your Certification Authority must be one of those that have been approved, the list of which you will find in the section Organisations that Issue Digital Certificates accredited by the Tax Agency. 

The specific steps to be followed will depend on the Certification Authority that you have chosen to issue your certificate (you might need to consult the web page of the authority that you have chosen).

  • Request of the via Internet certificate.
  • Proof of identity before one of the registration offices established by the Certification Authority. The documentation to provide when verifying your identity will depend on the type of electronic certificate requested.
  • Download of the via Internet certificate.
  • Backup of the certificate.

You can check this video (in spanish):  Como obtener un certificado de la AEAT  or see here for further details.

For example, in the case your certification authority would be the FNMT (Spanish National Mint), then the steps required in order to obtaining a certificate in software format, would be:

  • Go to http://www.cert.fnmt.es/
  • Select Company certificate (Certificado Empresa)
  • Select “company” (Persona Jurídica)

Do all the steps:

  • Preliminary configuration (configuracion previa). Required software installation.
  • Certificate request (solicitar certificado). Upon completion of this step, a request code (código de solicitud) will be received by email. This code will be requested in the identity proof step.
  • Identity Proof (Acreditar identidad), you might choose one of the following mechanisms:
    • Online: only for company codes with Tax ID A, B, C, and D
    • Onsite at Post office.
    • Onsite at an Identity Validation Office, such as:
      • Tax Agency identification office
      • CNMV identification office
      • Navarra  Identification office
    • Certificate Download ( descargar certificado) and payment (price list)

The Root certificates will be needed as well for the system setup, so do not forget to down load them too:

 

The full details of each step can be found in the following links:

  • Information and steps to obtain an electronic certificate
  • How to obtain an electronic certificate
  • How to download or install your electronic certificate
  • How to download the FNMT root certificate
  • How to verify the status of an FNMT or electronic DNI certificate
  • How to make a backup of your electronic certificate
  • How to import a valid copy of your electronic certificate
  • How to set a password for using your electronic certificate
  • Installation of the certificate on another computer or browser
  • How to renew your electronic certificate
  • How to cancel your electronic certificate
  • How to delete an electronic certificate
  • How to suspend an electronic certificate
  • Information on FNMT natural person certificates (AC FNMT Users)
  • Information on new representative certificates (FNMT)
  • Electronic certificates for minors
  • Electronic certificates on Android mobiles
  • Electronic certificates on iOS mobile devices
  • Error 403, SSL connection error, The page cannot be shown or Secure connection failed when accessing or signing a procedure on the internet

 

Tax agency technical support

In case of questions it is possible to access the Tax Agency in the following link:

https://sede.agenciatributaria.gob.es/Sede/ayuda/firma-digital-sistema-clave-pin-tecnica.html

 

 

Open the link Asistencia para soporte técnico

 

Tax Id Number and Name are required to submit any question.

SAP  links

  • Spain SII Setting Up SAP Integration Suite (SAP S/4HANA Cloud) - Neo
  • Spain SII Setting Up SAP Integration Suite (SAP S/4HANA Cloud) - Cloud Foundry
  • SAP Note 2469460 - Key-store management in SAP Cloud Platform Integration for process services
  • Blog: Cloud Integration - Keystore Monitor now available for Tenant Administrator
    Blog: Cloud Integration - How to Setup Secure Outbound HTTP Connection using Keystore Monitor
  • Blog: Get the Certificates right when integrating Electronic Tax Register Books for Spain Cloud Integration.

entry.title: Re: Unable to execute Adaptation Project from WebIde
entry.content: no one can help, so you can only provide these much. ask yourself what we can do?

entry.title: Re: Pick List Date must be between order date and cancell...
entry.content:
HI,

In my case, my current SO is not cancelled neither its Cancellation date is having a date. Nevertheless, the pick list is displaying this error message when creating it. 

As a workaround, I forced a date in cancellation date in the SO document. Finally got my pick list updated successfully.✔️ 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: How to have measures in between dimensions in SAC Tab...
entry.content: No, that's not supported by SAC table.

entry.title: Re: Gurugram Stammtisch: Invitation to SAP Community Members for Stammtisch at DLF Cyber Hub, Gurugr
entry.content: Looking forward to this event !

entry.title: Project cost vs payroll posting in professional services projects
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I have a question regarding how standard Consulting GL account should look both in P&L and in Project Profitabilty and if that is enough or not coming from Professional Services projects. I am curious if it correct and this how it should behave or are we missing something. Also I am curious how payroll postings would impact these(more on that under the pictures) This moment I have these:

In Project profitability:

In P&L:

and the total for all the postings of the consulting gl looks like this:

and here is one of those journal entry for this:

Concerning the payroll can anyone tell how would this lok or affect what we already have based on this:

  • A consultant works 160 hours in April on Project CNS1 (WBS1), recorded at 10 EUR/hour via timesheet → this posts 1,600 EUR to the project.

  • Payroll is run at month-end and generates actual costs of 1,605 EUR, split into:

    • Payroll Expense (61100000): 1,405 EUR

    • Social Security (61201000): 200 EUR

    • Liabilities: 21501000, 21502000, 21503000

We want the actual payroll cost (1,605 EUR) to be reflected against the project/WBS (not just the 1,600 EUR from timesheet), impacting project profitability and P&L correctly.

Questions:

  1. How can the payroll posting be linked to the project and WBS?

  2. If not possible directly, is it standard to post a manual journal:

    • Credit a payroll offset GL (new account)

    • Debit a COS account assigned to the project/WBS?

  3. How is the under/over-realization (in this case, 5 EUR) typically handled in S/4HANA?

  4. What is best practice for basing revenue on the actual payroll cost instead of time postings?

Thank you in advance

Levente

entry.title: Re: How to obtain the required SII certificates from the Spanish Tax Agency
entry.content: DISCLAIMER. The links in the blog are external, so they may be modified at any time externally by the Tax Agency or the Spanish National Mint without previous notice.

entry.title: Change formatting for Footer information via Manage Text
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are using Manage Text in S/4HANA Public Cloud to manage the information displayed in the Footer of the master template. There we show multiple lines of text and we would like some of the text to be formatted in bold.

Is it possible to add html tags or other formatting options via the app Manage Text?

Thanks

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Become an active member!!
entry.content: I am currently in an admin role with Xcel Energy

entry.title: Asset Accounting - What is ECC t-code ABSK in S/4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am working for a client who is transforming from ECC to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This asset topic is related to retirement with revenue and not integrated with Accounts Receivable (Local GAAP for Finland)

Our client has in ECC been using transaction ABSK, to achieve that the revenue part is being reposted from Gain from asset transactions account to depreciation difference account. 

Now in S/4 Public  cloud, the revenue part of the asset sales is posted to gain and loss to accounts defined in KTMEHR (for gain) and KTMIND (for loss). This is however not correct yet from accounting point of view. The revenue part should eventually hit the depreciation difference account, so that the P&L impact is zero for the company, but how can this be achieved in S/4 Public cloud?

I can google transaction types 200 (loss) and 210 (gain), but I cannot find those in particular in any of the posting menus. 

Hopefully somebody can help?

Thanks and Br,

-me-

entry.title: Re: Inactive Objects to be maintained from SU24 without d...
entry.content: I think the correct answer here is to use SU24 variants, this would be the best way to achieve what you need to achieve in a standard manner. Please mark this as closed.

entry.title: Re: Automated Update of open Sales Orders in case of Avai...
entry.content: One more Question related to this topic. So far we tested some of Our BOP Variants which work fine with ACL. However we are also using ABC functionality in some of our BOPs where it seems not to work correctly and not exclusively selects Material/Plant combinations which are stored in ACL. Do you have any Information here?

entry.title: Re: Create a SO with item category TAN and TAX and create...
entry.content: It is Public Cloud Raymond. I checked Split Analysis. this is not happening.

entry.title: Re: About the Coffee Corner – JOIN now, it’s interesting and fun!
entry.content: This sounds like a great site to reorganize one's thoughts, or find a good conversation

entry.title: Different picking locations on 1 Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hello,
 
my customer wants to be able in the same purchase order different picking location as the same business partner can have different physical location.
 
My first guess was to change the location directly on the FO, but I have an error message : 
If I change the location at FO level :

 

 
So 2nd guess is to modify directly in the purchase order
If we add at header level a GS partner :

 

At FO level the result is

 

The issue is that the modification is made at header level, for all the items of the PO and consequently for all the FU
This solution is not relevant for my customer because their process is to send a PO to their supplier, then the supplier replies and indicates on which location the shipment will occur.
 
Is there another solution that will allow to have different picking location on a PO ? Maybe by adding a location custom field at PO item level ?

entry.title: Re: We need to know how many times a transaction have bee...
entry.content: CHeck the ST03N tcode. You can also get your ABAP guys to create a custom Tcode for this.

entry.title: Re: Hi, did you manage to solve the issue? I have encountered the same problem.
entry.content:
Hi @Luana995,

which problem are you facing? You have created a new thread/question entry without content or explanation. Maybe you were trying to answer another topic.

KR Isa

entry.title: Re: alm-ts-backend vs alm-ts application roles
entry.content: Thank you for updating this with details.

entry.title: Re: A Step-By-Step Walkthrough for SAP Analytics Cloud compass (PART I)
entry.content:
@ChenNee 

Very good step-by-step guide and a very promising feature for planning. In fact, we encountered challenges in our sales planning demo when it came to drivers like price and discount, as only drivers with the aggregation type "sum" were supported. We described our scenario in a blog post: SAP Analytics Cloud Compass – a new approach to risk analysis 

Are there already plans to support more flexible key figure definitions and aggregations in the future?

It's also good to know that the functionality to use % inputs, not just absolute values, will be delivered in Q3.

entry.title: Re: Automatic Determination of Settlement rule for WBS el...
entry.content: There is standard configuration in SAP to define a Settlement Rule Strategy where you can define the Responsible Cost Center as the receiver.  The strategy is assigned to a Project Profile.  There are transactions and a BADI available to generate the settlement rules.  You will need a small enhancement to trigger the transaction when a WBS is REL.

entry.title: Re: Badi /SCWM/ADHU and /SCWM/ADPROD
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check BADI /SCWM/EX_CORE_CR_INT_CR. it will work in /SCWM/ADPROD and /SCWM/ADHU tcode.

entry.title: Re: Blog it Forward - Raquel Cunha - version 2025
entry.content:
Great article, I love it
My career in SAP wouldn’t be the same without your help, Raquel. I'm truly grateful for all your support ^^

entry.title: Novidade para Estudantes e Futuros Profissionais SAP!
entry.content:
A SAP lançou a Student Edition gratuita da sua plataforma de aprendizado — uma chance incrível para você começar sua carreira no mundo SAP 💼💻

O que você vai encontrar:
✅ Acesso 100% gratuito
✅ Trilhas oficiais de aprendizado SAP
✅ Prática com SAP S/4HANA
✅ Conteúdo para se preparar para certificações

Seja você de TI, negócios, finanças ou engenharia, essa é a hora de aprender SAP sem pagar nada!

Trilhas disponíveis:
Consultor SAP Finance
Desenvolvedor SAP
Analista de Dados SAP
Consultor SAP Tech

Como garantir seu acesso:
1️⃣ Crie ou entre com seu SAP Universal ID (nome e sobrenome)
2️⃣ Verifique seu status de estudante (use o e-mail da sua faculdade)
3️⃣ Ative o perfil e comece a aprender!
🔗 Link oficial pra se inscrever:
👉 https://lnkd.in/dc9Zv8_j

entry.title: SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA now supports SAP S/4HANA private Cloud / RISE Target Versions
entry.content:
Dear All,

SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA can now be used for both SAP S/4HANA (on premise) and SAP S/4HANA private Cloud (PCE/RISE) target product versions.

​SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA private Cloud are developed in the same codeline and are identical concerning the relevant simplification items. Nevertheless, there are differences in the compatibility scope items and successor functionalities (for example the successor of FI-TV on premise is Travel Management, on PCE the successor is SAP Concur).

The correct target SAP S/4HANA version is selected in the dropdown list in the SAP Readiness Check data collection report RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA:

Please note: To see the SAP S/4HANA private Cloud entries in the list, you may need to update your local replica of the simplification item catalog.

To determine whether any action is required, go to transaction SA38 in the system to be analyzed and run report RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA. If the SAP S/4HANA private Cloud versions are not yet visible in the Target S/4HANA Version list, the local replica of the simplification item catalog needs to be updated.

To update the Simplification Item Catalog, perform the following steps:

    1. Execute the report /SDF/RC_START_CHECK in the source system via transaction SA38.
    2. Choose the Update Catalog with latest version from SAP button.

 As a result, the local replica of the simplification item catalog will be updated. You can now run report RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA again, and the Target S/4HANA Version list will now include the latest generally available SAP S/4HANA product versions.

----------------

Manual Upload of the Simplification Item Catalog

Alternatively, if the SAP-SUPPORT_PORTAL RFC destination is unable to connect with the SAP support backbone, you can update the simplification item catalog content manually:

    1. Open the simplification item catalog content in SAP for Me
    2. Choose the Download Simplification Item icon to download the content to your local computer.
    3. Run the report /SDF/RC_START_CHECK.
    4. Choose the Upload Simplification Item Catalog from the file button and upload the content from where you saved it in step 2.

Now you can execute report RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA again. The latest SAP S/4HANA product versions will now be visible in the Target S/4HANA Version list. Proceed as described in SAP Note 2913617 (SAP S/4HANA conversions) or SAP Note 3059197 (SAP S/4HANA upgrades) to perform the data collection and create the new analysis.

entry.title: Remapping of GL expense cost element - DIP Profile/Events Based Revenue Recognition
entry.content:
Good Afternoon

I've read the blog Configuration of G/L Accounts in Event-Based Revenue Recognition which has been extremely informative (https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/configuration-of-g-l-accounts)

I would like to pose a question,  our client would like to move a GL account that has been assigned to a non-billable cost element to a billable cost element. The General Ledger account has been used over time.

What would be Best Practice?

entry.title: Re: Missing fields and changed field names after upgrade...
entry.content: Hello Edrilan, Thank you for responding. I have attached screenshot of Purchase Info Record from both EHPs, if this is helpful to share any solution that you may have. I may say that I have checked configuration for screen layout and even the screen in SE80 for Purchase info record. It does have the field, but it is not getting displayed when we run Purchase info record transactions.

thanks for raising the described issue. As it requires a more detailed analysis from SAP, please create a regular support ticket for SAC Calendar.

Thank you + best regards,

Roman Möhl

You’re doing an amazing job spreading all that knowledge
Well done Sandra  !

entry.title: SAP Certification for Partners: An Overview of the Latest Changes - Including Q&A
entry.content:
On March 19, Suzanne Heiob, SAP Certification Product Management, and Axel Meinke, Partner Enablement Manager MEE, invited SAP partners to provide information on the latest updates in the SAP certification program. The German session offered insights into the transformation of the certification program and introduced a range of updates. It also provided space for questions and discussion. To help you as partners prepare for the new requirements, here is a focused summary of the webinar content and related questions from the Q&A.

 

What's New in the SAP Certification Program?

A key change in the certification program is the focus on role-based certifications. The goal is to align the skills of SAP partners precisely with practical requirements. The new certifications cover critical roles such as Enterprise Architects and Implementation Consultants, which were not sufficiently represented in the past due to the strong product focus. In addition, certifications that are no longer relevant have been removed from the portfolio to focus on supporting cloud deployments and S/4HANA transformations.

 

Additional Certification Requirements for SAP Partners

By July 2025, all partner resources in key roles – enterprise architects, developers, business transformation management consultants, project managers involved in RISE with SAP projects – must have a valid SAP certification. By the end of 2025, it is expected that 50% of relevant partner practitioners will hold at least one valid certification in the SAP solution portfolio. Overall, this means that SAP partners will need to continuously update and expand their skills.

 

The 'Get- and Stay-Certified' Model

Starting April 2024, certifications will need to be renewed annually through a ‘Stay-Certified’ assessment. This short quiz generally requires up to two hours of learning effort, lasts 20–30 minutes, and extends the certification by 12 months. This is particularly important for those who wish to retain their certifications after March 31, 2025, as without taking such an assessment, the certification status will expire.

Continuous proof of knowledge ensures that experts are always up to date with SAP innovations. This secures both the quality of SAP projects and individual competitiveness in the job market. To make this visible, there are digital badges available for both completing certifications and completing Learning Journeys (including a short self-test). These badges can be shared on LinkedIn or viewed on Credly.

 

SAP Universal ID: Simplified Certification Transfer

An important innovation is the introduction of the SAP Universal ID. This ID is a lifelong personal identifier that facilitates the management of certifications across different employers. At least two different email addresses, including a private one, must be linked to activate the Universal ID. This ensures that access to the ID remains even when switching companies.

 

SAP Learning Hub and Certification

A subscription to SAP Learning Hub includes access to all SAP learning materials and four certification attempts per year. The costs for the initial certification and the 'Stay Certified' assessments are included in the SAP Learning Hub subscription. A certification remains valid for 12 months as long as regular assessments are passed. Re-certification does not require a certification voucher and can be attempted an unlimited number of times.

Live sessions in SAP Learning Hub are particularly helpful for exam preparation, such as the 'Structured Guided Learning' or 'Stay Certified' formats. Furthermore, you gain access to pre-configured training systems for practical exercises. With a subscription to SAP Learning Hub, you are well equipped: You have the flexibility to design your learning times individually, prepare for exams, and take them. This combination of independent learning, practical exercise opportunities in test environments, and interactive sessions ensures that you are optimally prepared for your certifications.

The Learning Hub Adoption Dashboard is also a valuable tool that allows learning managers to monitor and manage the certification transformation within the company. Here you can view relevant information about the learning and certification status of your employees and coordinate necessary steps to secure certification status before the deadline.

 

Q&A from the Session (originially in German, translated below)

Universal ID

 

I have a question about the Universal ID. Why do I need to link two email addresses? And why must the two email addresses have different domains? This results in needing to link a private email address for everyone requiring a Universal SAP ID.

The purpose of the second email is for recovery, in case you lose your access credentials. It's recommended to use a private email as a recovery option because the UID accompanies you throughout your career (unlike the old user model where S-Users, for example, belonged to the employer).

If you're experiencing the error: "Can't see your certifications? Your emails linked to SAP Universal ID are not verified.” How can you verify your email if it has been the associated email for years?

 

You should have received a verification email to the corresponding address. If it's not there, please check your spam folder.

 

Certification

 

Where can I find an overview of which certifications already exist in my company?

If you're a Learning Manager, you can request the reporter role for the Learning Hub Dashboard by submitting a ticket. You'll find an overview of your certified consultants under Certifications (provided the learners have a license for SAP Learning Hub).

I have certifications under different S-User/C-User accounts. What do I need to do to transfer these certifications to the new UID?

You need to generate the UID and add the certified S-/P-Users (simple context menu – "Add User" in the process).

Do certifications obtained without LH not count for the company?

They do count – you can also directly purchase certification attempts. Re-certification is only possible via SAP LH.

Is there an overview of certifications available without Learning Hub access?

You can find an overview of all certifications here: https://learning.sap.com/certifications?page=1. The overview of your certified learners, regardless of SAP Learning Hub licenses, can also be found in SAP for Me.

Can a certification completed in 2022 on an old Universal ID (with a previous employer) be transferred to a new one, and if so, how?The UID does not belong to an employer like the user in the old model but is personal to you. In your case, you simply need to add the S-User ID of your new employer to your existing UID.

It has recently been communicated that special certification requirements are being imposed on SAP partners. What (type) of certifications are specifically needed? Are there must-have certifications?

For partners, certifications listed in the Partner Competency Framework are particularly relevant: https://partneredge.sap.com/en/partnership/manage/competency/requirements.html

What does the status "certified stay" “completed” and “in progress” mean?

The status "completed" does not exist. We have on SAP Learning the status "up to date" when someone is valid with their current certification and the due date is a long time away. Then there is "Stay certified due", when the due date is within the next two weeks.

Currently, it's still possible to purchase certification attempts separately without LH. At the end of last year, SAP communicated frequently that a license for SAP Learning Hub will soon be mandatory and that certifications cannot be acquired mid-term without Learning Hub. Is there a clear, definitive statement from SAP on this matter? Can certification attempts still be purchased separately without a license for SAP Learning Hub?

"Stay certified": this requires a valid SAP Learning Hub subscription.

 

"Stay Certified": this requires a valid SAP Learning Hub subscription.

 

There is a separate package with 2 standalone certification attempts. These attempts can only be used for the initial certification. Delays for extending validity must subsequently be completed through LH; therefore, LH is necessary long-term to remain certified.

Is there an overview listing which certifications bring how many points towards partner status? How do we know which certifications will be retired and which will remain?

The Partner Competency Framework can be found here: https://partneredge.sap.com/en/partnership/manage/competency/requirements.html

 

The list of all certifications can be found here: https://learning.sap.com/certifications?page=1. Any certifications not listed there have already been retired.

If the exam for re-certification is not completed by March 31, 2025, can the exam still be taken later?

Yes, but you lose your status and are no longer certified until you pass the new exam. Instead of simply taking the shorter re-certification test, you need to get fully certified again.

The News Alert states "By July this year, all partner resources in key roles – such as enterprise architects, developers, business transformations management consultants, and project managers involved in RISE with SAP projects – must have a valid SAP certification." Which certifications are specifically meant here?

You can find an overview of the necessary training and certifications for GROW and RISE in the following link: https://partneredge.sap.com/en/partnership/manage/competency/requirements.html

 

Is the competency relevance of a certificate visible only in the Learning Hub Adoption Dashboard or is this overview available outside of this dashboard?

The Partner Competency Framework can also be found here: https://partneredge.sap.com/en/partnership/manage/competency.html

Can we use certifications from our external consultants? Even if they are not employed by us?

 

Once the external consultant receives an S-User from your company and links this S-User to their SAP Universal ID, this certification will also be counted for your company.

How is the certification status of consultants in projects verified?

Via the Digital Badge, which indicates whether a consultant is still validly certified.

What does the status "Completed" mean in SAP for me?

Someone has completed the stay certified assessment and extended their certification.

What does "Stay certified" = "In Progress" mean?

This means that the learner has created a Universal ID but has yet to pass an assessment.

Are there new or additional certifications for authorization consultants planned?

Currently, no new certification is planned. Here is the portal to check if there is a successor for a specific certification: https://www.sap.com/certificationfinder

Learning Manager

 

How do I become a Learning Manager or nominate others?

Initially in the contract – for further nominations, information can be found here: https://partneredge.sap.com/en/partnership/manage/training/certified.html

What resources are available for Learning Managers?

The Learning Manager Hub (https://partneredge.sap.com/en/partnership/manage/training/certified.html)in the Partner Portal provides Q&A, email templates, and other helpful resources.

SAP Learning Hub

 

When I want to log in to the Learning Hub via web, I receive the message "HTTP Status 400 – Bad Request." Is there a new link for this? (https://learninghub.sap.com/login)

https://learninghub.sap.com is the official page for the SAP Learning Hub. Issues might also be browser-related. Try using a different browser in case of problems.

I want to know how I can obtain the "Learning Manager" permission.

The "IT Contact Person" automatically gains access to the Learning Analytics Dashboard for all learners. When purchasing, you can request admin authorization for additional users via ticket.

Learning.sap.com

 

Why are there now two pages: Learning.sap.com and Learninghub.sap.com? Will they be merged in the future?

That is the long-term plan. Unfortunately, in the ongoing operation, this can only be gradually adjusted, including the information from training.sap.com that is also being migrated. The goal is to have everything on learning.sap.com. For example, openSAP courses, certification information, and more have already been migrated there. It is increasingly becoming the single point of access, where some content or features, such as re-certification or hands-on systems, live sessions, are only accessible through the Learning Hub subscription.

 

Additional Resources

You can find more information and details on the topic at the following addresses – feel free to browse:

  • German materials from the session can be found here: Recording & Slides
  • SAP Learning Hub – Overview of the Learning Platform
  • Overview of all SAP certifications
  • SAP Certification Finder: Find the right certification for your needs
  • SAP Certification on learning.sap.com: Your central entry point
  • Partner Competency Framework: All requirements for SAP partners
  • Stay updated on training and certification with the SAP Learning Newsletter (German version here)!

Do you have questions? Feel free to leave them in the comments!

entry.title: Re: Delete Business Partner in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud i...
entry.content:
Hi Tim

You have to do Show Filters, then change the Recommended View settings

 

Then you will see it

However, the Modeling Source is not checked. So there could be some restrictions to the CDS View usage. It may also need elevated rights as many BP CDS Views do for privacy compliance. I did a quick Preview with just the BP Relationship 2 view, it has warnings, but the Preview Data shows some data.

entry.title: Testing of cutover activities in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question regarding the testing of cutover activities. Within a certain system landscape there are cutover activities which will be carried out when a system change will be carried out. For this cutover activities, a certain list with detailed items which must be checked will be created. Within the cutover activities you are going through the list an work on all of the the items mentioned in the list.

But how can I test the cutover acitivities in the new system? Is there a kind of checklist or certain aspects which must be taken into consideration?

Thank you and best regards

Jan

entry.title: Re: How to have measures in between dimensions in SAC Tab...
entry.content: There can be a workaround using Measure Based Dimensions but the tricky part is the Dimension Context, you have to take only those dimensions that are there in Table.

entry.title: Re: Readiness Check: Target S/4HANA Version: SAP S/4HANA...
entry.content:
Hi Valeska,

SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA can now be used for both SAP S/4HANA (on premise) and SAP S/4HANA private Cloud (PCE/RISE) target product versions.

Please see this blog for details and a description how you can update the Simplification Item Catalog in your source system.

Thanks,

Astrid

entry.title: Re: Asset Accounting - What is ECC t-code ABSK in S/4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content: Editing to the previous, that the ABSK in ECC is posting credit accum. depr diff and debit depr diff P&L account, so the impact in P&L is zero.

entry.title: Step-by-Step guide: Adding Image Captions in SAP Community
entry.content:
Below is a step-by-step guide on how to add captions to images in the SAP Community platform. The example shows the blog post creation interface, but it’s relevant for all content creation scenarios in SAP Community. 

  1. Accessing content creation interface 
  • Go to community.sap.com  
  • Click on a category (for example CRM and Customer experience)
  • Click on “Create a Post”:  
 

Showing the position of a Create a Post button in a community category page

-Click on “Choose a board”:  

 

Showing in the blog creation UI where to click in order to choose a board

  -Click on “Show all”:  

 Showing in the blog post creation UI how to view all boards you can select from

 

-Select the board where you would like to post your content:   

 Showing how to select the board in which you want to create your blog post

 

2. Positioning your image 

- Position your cursor where you want the image to appear 

- From the formatting toolbar at the top of the editor, select the Camera icon (labeled “Insert Photos” in the tooltip) 

Showing where the camera icon is in the blog post creation UI

- This will open the choose file dialog window  

 3. Selecting image file  

-Click on “Choose Files”:  

 

Shows where to click in order to Choose files 

  • Select the image you want to use and click “Open”:  

 Shows how to select an image and clicking on "Open" to have used in the post  

 4. 

Adding caption: 

After uploading, you'll see a field for entering the caption. 

  • - Now Put the cursor in white space below the image 
  • Enter the text according to the best practices shared above 
  • Follow the best practices discussed earlier. 
  • Click “Done”  
 

Showing where you should add the alternative text

  •  Click “Post”:  

Shows where to click in order to post the blog post

 Once published, this is how your image will appear with the caption below it:  

 

Showing the published blog post and the position of the alternative text

entry.title: Re: Under which schema can we find the CDS view created by developers?
entry.content: Thanks for the information. How did you query the CDS View parameter in AMDP ?

entry.title: Re: FI document summarization is active / the results may be incorrect in MB5B
entry.content: I want the opposite: to add fields like the account key or condition type to separate the lines in the financial document. How do I do that?

entry.title: How can I transport tables, views and folders from one space to another?
entry.content:
I want to transport an analytical model from one space to another, this model have a depencency from multiple local tables and views, and each one of those are in diferent folders.

How can I transport the model and all it's dependencies to another space mantaining the folders association of each asset? 

I tried the Export CSN/JSON and import it in the other space, but that doesn't import the folders.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for April – SAP Build 👷‍♀️🏠
entry.content:
Ahh… escaped! Garage unlocked 🔓😁

#EscapeMode

Good challenge = Better learning!

entry.title: Re: CLT: Copy country by itself
entry.content:
Dear Derek,

Using CLT, it is only allowed to create local versions for country/region that is not delivered by SAP in standard. 

For the supported country/region in CLT refer to SAP Note: 3107866

Regarding the changing the local currency it is not possible in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. If you like to have this feature in public cloud, I suggest you to raise it as customer influence request in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Finance campaign.

Regards

Sathya Nallusamy

entry.title: Re: Downloading a Report Output in SAP Without Using Spool Request
entry.content:
The obligatory "thanks for sharing" pat on the back but if I'm completely honest, this is just not a good post for many reasons.

Let's ignore the fact that this is "ABAP like it's 1999" and focus on the premise. The post starts with "download file in a readable format (e.g., .txt, .csv, .xlsx)". One might argue that every format is readable if you try hard enough. But when it comes to the file operations, in ABAP we usually distinguish between the plain text and binary format. Plain text would be TXT, CSV and the likes. Binary format would be anything else, most typically PDF or Excel format.

In the code example, the data is converted to binary format, so this is clearly not an example for a "readable", plain text format like TXT.

I was confused by the notion in the title of why spool request would be involved at all in the file operation in ABAP. There are plenty of examples out there (including ABAP Help or very simple ones from our book) that do not involve spool. Spool has to do with printing and/or the forms. If the task was "get some data, format it nicely using a form, then download it as PDF", then yes, you'd have to deal with the spool in some way. But this is not the scenario in this post.

Second premise was "we need to automate report execution and download without user interaction". I was actually very curious how you would accomplish this. And then this post... just didn't. Do you understand what GUI_DOWNLOAD does? How would you run this "without user interaction"? Where would the file go? Try scheduling this in a background job and see what happens.

Additionally, I don't understand why would anyone need material data in a PDF format. I get it if this was a CSV or an Excel format but PDF. Why?

Here are some suggestions on how to do better next time.

  • Take a look at the SAP examples here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/abap-cheat-sheets
  • All code examples from our ABAP book are here: https://github.com/Boneill3/IntroToABAP/tree/master They're very simple because it's a beginner book, but at least they're written using Clean ABAP and latest syntax at the time of writing.
  • I feel this file should've been an Excel spreadsheet and not PDF, so obligatory ABAP2XLSX link.
  • Always question why something is done one way and not the other. When you've completed the code, always ask yourself if there is a better way to achieve the same result.
  • Most importantly, if you say you'll write about something, then write about that. Deceiving the readers won't get you anywhere.

Good luck.

entry.title: Re: SAP Opens Restaurant
entry.content: You can have any dish you like, as long as it's seaweed. 🙂

entry.title: Re: How to create WBS set (GS01) in SAP cloud?
entry.content: Hello, in the Manage Global Hierarchies app you can create a WBS Element hierarchy

entry.title: expected status code 200 but got 500: "error creating graph: error creating graph: abap: request fai
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm new to SAP Data Intelligence, recently I have created a new configuration (MTID) for replication of a table in SAP DI.

However, i'm having some issue with the graph.

I have create a graph as below. 

When I run the graph initially, i am getting the error and graph is terminating (you can see the error message in the screenshot).

In the SLT system, schedule is created from the above graph as you can see below.

When i run the graph again, It again fails with error "Mass transfer ID XXX is already being used to replicate data for table XXX".

Could you please suggest where the issue might be coming from? and how I can fix it?

Thanks for the help.

entry.title: Support CrystalReportViewer.DoubleClickPage in ASP.NET Webforms?
entry.content:
Please I need to know if Crystal Reports in ASP.NET WebForms support DoubleClickPage event to do a Drill-down feature.

I use it in my WinForms App. to open another report based on current report object info in page line.

        private void CrystalReportViewer_DoubleClickPage(object sender, PageMouseEventArgs e)
        {
            int drillbrn = 0, drilltyp = 0, drillnum = 0;
            if (e.ObjectInfos != null)
            {
                if (e.ObjectInfos.HasName("tdtbrn1"))
                {
                    foreach (ObjectInfo oi in e.ObjectInfos)
                    {
                        if (oi.Name == "tdtbrn1")
                            drillbrn = oi.Text.AsInt32();
                        if (oi.Name == "tdttyp1")
                            drilltyp = oi.Text.AsInt32();
                        if (oi.Name == "tdtnum1")
                            drillnum = oi.Text.AsInt32();
                    }
                    ReportDocument2.FileName = ReportsPath + "AccJV.rpt";
                    ReportDocument2.RecordSelectionFormula = "{AccTransHed.thd_brn} = " + drillbrn + " and {AccTransHed.thd_typ} = " + drilltyp + " and {AccTransHed.thd_num} = " + drillnum;
                    ReportDocument2.Execute(showAsDialog: true); // open another report dialog
                    ReportDocument2.Close();
                }
            }
        }

I try to ask ChatGPT for any resources. but don't find anything.

 https://chatgpt.com/share/67fd36b2-eb7c-8010-9518-f4f947b1dc0d

 

Can you please tell me how to do DoublePageClick event or alternate in ASP.NET WebForms CrystalReportVIewer.

entry.title: Automated Support Insights report generation in Customer Insights dashboard
entry.content:
We are thrilled to announce the upcoming release of a new, game-changing feature in our Customer Insights Dashboard - the Automated Support Insight Report (SIR).

This automated PDF report will be generated as a self-service, offering a comprehensive and detailed view of the situation of SAP solutions from various critical perspectives such as the product portfolio, usage and adoption, cases overview, cloud availability, delivered services, and more.

There are numerous advantages and benefits of this cutting-edge feature:

  1. Holistic View: The automated SIR provides a comprehensive overview, allowing you to gain insights into the performance and utilization of SAP solutions from a single, intuitive report across various aspects.
  2. Actionable Insights & Data-Driven Decision: With the automated report generation, the identifying areas for improvement and optimization becomes very quick, enabling you to take targeted actions across the product portfolio, usage, cases, services, and other critical metrics. Equipped with detailed and relevant insights, you can make informed business decisions that drive greater operational efficiency, improving your overall SAP solution performance.
  3. Simplification and Time-saving: The automated SIR reduces the need for manual report generation, saving your team valuable time and effort, allowing you to focus on leveraging insights rather than compiling data. The report generation as an automated self-service streamlines the process of staying informed without the need for labour-intensive manual data collection and analysis.
  4. Moment Comparison: The pdf-based report allows you to "freeze the moment" and compare data from the last report generation with the next one. This enables you to track changes and performance trends over time, providing a static reference point for analysis that is not affected by real-time dashboard updates.

 You can start the Support Insight report by going to the menu “PDF Report Generator” in the upper right corner and selecting the link Download Support Insights Report.

The customer accounts you used in the dashboard will be automatically taken over into the default report selection. The default period is 6 months, which can be changed by using the drop-down menu.

The Support Insights report provides a various number of important KPIs across Collaboration, Innovation & Value Realization, Empowerment and Mission Critical Support.

We are confident that the automated Support Insight Report will be a valuable addition and a game-changer for your experience with SAP Customer Insights. This feature aims to provide you with actionable intelligence to enhance your SAP solution performance, enabling you to drive your business forward proactively.

Stay tuned for the rollout of this exciting new feature, and get ready to unlock the full potential of your SAP solutions with Customer Insights!

We welcome your feedback and suggestions for further automated pdf-reports to be provided as a self-service.

Please use the ‘Feedback’-link in the left side-menu of the page or the comments to this blog for sharing with us your feedback on this new feature and helping us improving the reporting functionality in SAP for Me.

Stay updated by subscribing to this blog and visiting the SAP Support Portal / Customer Insights.
